summary: Press release announcing a strategic collaboration between ARTAN Bio and Syenex dated June 6, 2025. ARTAN Bio is developing ARTAN-102, a codon suppressor therapeutic for aging and age-related disease. The partnership provides ARTAN access to Syenex's VivoCell Platform for precision in vivo delivery vehicle development to accelerate progression from in vitro proof-of-concept to IND-enabling studies.

content_blocks.title: Partnership Announcement and Development Stage
content_blocks.content: ARTAN Bio partners with Syenex to access the VivoCell Platform for precision in vivo delivery of ARTAN-102, their lead drug candidate. Goal is to accelerate timeline from in vitro proof-of-concept to IND-enabling studies. Dr. Michael Torres (CSO, ARTAN) states they are progressing toward IND-enabling studies. Jay Rosanelli (CEO, Syenex) confirms ARTAN has generated strong preclinical data on ARTAN-102's therapeutic potential. This indicates the project is currently in preclinical development, having established in vitro proof-of-concept and now advancing toward regulatory-enabling studies.

content_blocks.title: Collaboration Scope and Technical Details
content_blocks.content: Partnership includes: (1) Rapid Prototyping - Platform access to complete VivoCell Platform with libraries of precision delivery components, Syenex pre-clinical scale prototyping and production support; (2) Manufacturing Scale-Up - Prototypes to be transferred to Syenex CDMO partner for GMP scale-up; (3) Option Rights - Non-exclusive Program License option for clinical delivery vehicle composition. This demonstrates movement toward manufacturing capability and regulatory readiness (GMP production), key indicators of advancing TRL.

content_blocks.title: ARTAN Bio Company Description and Therapeutic Approach
content_blocks.content: ARTAN Bio is developing first-in-class therapeutics to restore full-length, functional proteins involved in aging and age-related disease using a codon suppressor platform. The company is community-backed with a decentralized scientific community of stakeholders. Lead candidate is ARTAN-102. The therapeutic mechanism involves codon suppression technology to restore protein function, representing a novel modality for aging and age-related diseases.

content_blocks.title: Syenex Company Background and Capabilities
content_blocks.content: Syenex is an open-science biotechnology platform company founded in 2022 providing cell programming capabilities with precision and scale. Leverages synthetic biology and global CDMO network. Provides plug-and-play delivery platforms from discovery through GMP manufacturing. Has assembled portfolio of cell-specific ex vivo and in vivo delivery platforms with over 50 partnerships across biopharma and academia. Relevant for assessing partner capabilities and manufacturing pathway viability.

key_findings: ARTAN-102 is the lead drug candidate, a codon suppressor therapeutic for aging and age-related disease
Project has achieved in vitro proof-of-concept and is progressing toward IND-enabling studies, indicating late preclinical stage (TRL 2-3 transition)
Strong preclinical data reported for ARTAN-102's therapeutic potential
Partnership aims to develop precision in vivo delivery vehicles, addressing a critical CMC/delivery challenge
GMP manufacturing scale-up pathway established through Syenex CDMO partnership
Non-exclusive program license option secured for clinical delivery vehicle, relevant for IP strategy
ARTAN Bio is community-backed with decentralized research model
First-in-class therapeutic mechanism using codon suppression to restore full-length functional proteins

milestones.title: ARTAN Bio & Syenex Strategic Collaboration Announced
milestones.description: ARTAN Bio and Syenex publicly announced a strategic collaboration to access Syenex's VivoCell Platform for precision in vivo delivery of ARTAN's lead drug, ARTAN-102.
milestones.source_quote: CHICAGO & HOUSTON, Texas – June 6, 2025 – ARTAN Bio, a community-backed biotechnology company developing therapeutics to reverse epigenetic changes associated with aging and age-related disease, and Syenex, an open-science genetic medicines platform company, today announced a strategic collaboration to access Syenex's precision in vivo delivery technologies, the VivoCell Platform, for ARTAN's lead drug, ARTAN-102.

milestones.title: Syenex Founded
milestones.description: Syenex was founded, establishing the open-science biotechnology platform company.
milestones.source_quote: Founded in 2022, Syenex has assembled a portfolio of cell-specific ex vivo and in vivo delivery platforms and over 50 partnerships with industry leaders across biopharma and academia.

milestones.title: ARTAN-102 Strong Preclinical Data Generated
milestones.description: ARTAN Bio has generated strong preclinical data on the therapeutic potential of ARTAN-102, their lead drug candidate.
milestones.source_quote: ARTAN Bio has generated strong preclinical data on the therapeutic potential of their lead drug candidate, ARTAN-102.

milestones.title: Rapid Prototyping via VivoCell Platform
milestones.description: Syenex to provide ARTAN access to the complete VivoCell Platform, including libraries of precision delivery components, with pre-clinical scale prototyping and production support.
milestones.source_quote: Rapid Prototyping – Platform Access to the complete VivoCell Platform including libraries of precision delivery components supported by Syenex pre-clinical scale prototyping and production support.

milestones.title: GMP Manufacturing Scale-Up
milestones.description: Prototypes developed on the VivoCell Platform to be transferred to Syenex's CDMO partner for GMP scale-up.
milestones.source_quote: Manufacturing Scale-Up – Prototypes to be transferred to Syenex CDMO partner for GMP scale-up.

milestones.title: Non-Exclusive Program License Option
milestones.description: Syenex grants ARTAN a non-exclusive program license option for the clinical delivery vehicle composition.
milestones.source_quote: Option Rights – Non-exclusive Program License option for the clinical delivery vehicle composition.

milestones.title: Progression to IND-Enabling Studies
milestones.description: The collaboration aims to accelerate ARTAN's program from in vitro proof-of-concept to IND-enabling studies in a capital-efficient manner.
milestones.date: accelerate the timeline of ARTAN's program from in vitro proof-of-concept to IND-enabling studies
milestones.source_quote: The goal is to accelerate the timeline of ARTAN's program from in vitro proof-of-concept to IND-enabling studies while maintaining a maximally capital-efficient path for ARTAN.
